title: Resolution approving and adopting the MDRRMC Resolution No. 2019-05 dated June 6, 2019, entitled ?Resolution realigning the amount of Five Hundred Thousand Pesos (PHP 500,000.00) from the allocation for construction and rehabilitation of facilities under the current Municipal Disaster Risk Reduction and Management fund for CY 2019 for the fabrication of collapsible tents and further approving the same.?
